description_long: This sculpture features a group of stylized human figures standing and kneeling on a rectangular stone base. The figures are arranged in rows, with some standing upright and others kneeling, all facing forward with simplified, elongated forms and indistinct facial features. The surface of the figures appears weathered and textured, giving a sense of age and solemnity. The base is scattered with small stones and pebbles, adding to the sense of a memorial or commemorative installation. The overall color palette is dominated by shades of gray and muted blue, with the stone base providing a contrasting texture. The arrangement and posture of the figures evoke a sense of unity, remembrance, or collective experience.
description: A solemn group of stylized human figures, some standing and some kneeling, arranged on a textured stone base with scattered pebbles. The sculpture is rendered in muted grays and blues, evoking a memorial or commemorative scene.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full group of figures facing forward, with both standing and kneeling individuals clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the arrangement and the kneeling figures on the right edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the figures and the arrangement of their postures from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the kneeling figures on the left and the linear arrangement of the group.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is set on a stone base with scattered pebbles, suggesting an outdoor public or memorial space.
